## Checks

- [ ] I kept the change scoped and avoided unrelated rewrites.
- [ ] I read `SKILL.md`, `references/00-index.md`, and the smallest relevant reference before editing.
- [ ] I kept `SKILL.md` lightweight unless this is an entrypoint-level change.
- [ ] I updated `references/00-index.md` if routing changed.
- [ ] I synchronized `README.md` and `README.en.md` when public behavior or metadata changed.
- [ ] I did not include real secrets, tokens, private hostnames, production URLs, customer data, or personal machine paths.
- [ ] I ran the lightest relevant validation and documented the result below.
